introSection: Apple Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Codona's Amusement Park, Aberdeen, Scotland, UK. It completes 3 circuits of the track. The roller coaster was built by Pinfari.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
For the 2014 season, an on-ride camera, fake grass, flowers and new fencing were added to the ride.

In 2020, the roller coaster was moved to where the Looping Star previously stood. A new set of go-karts was built where the Apple Coaster and the White Water Log Flume were previously.

fullText:
Apple Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Codona's Amusement Park, Aberdeen, Scotland, UK. It completes 3 circuits of the track. The roller coaster was built by Pinfari.

For the 2014 season, an on-ride camera, fake grass, flowers and new fencing were added to the ride.

In 2020, the roller coaster was moved to where the Looping Star previously stood. A new set of go-karts was built where the Apple Coaster and the White Water Log Flume were previously.
